---
title: "python.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/core/commands/python.ts"
loc: 61
complexity: 6
logic_score: 7.15
style_score: 3.85
intel_score: 2.66
overall_score: 4.20
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Command](file://commander)
- [join](file://node:path)
- [execa](file://execa)

### Exports
- `registerPythonSpokes`
- `registerPythonSpokes`
- `pythonPath`
- `dormancyScript`
- `pythonPath`
- `learnScript`
